creator: devzone.my@gmail.com
text:
ZendOptimizer Plus, current opensource project on github ( https://github.com/zend-dev/ZendOptimizerPlus )

Compatibility
-------------

This version of Zend Optimizer+ is compatible with PHP 5.2.*, 5.3.*, 5.4.*
and PHP-5.5 development branch.  PHP 5.2 support may be removed in the future.

Link
-------------
- https://wiki.php.net/rfc/optimizerplus
- http://ckon.wordpress.com/2013/02/02/apc-replaced-by-zend-optimizerplus-php-5-5/
- http://goo.gl/TpcUy

Fix: 

Fix Problem compatibility for all PHP version code
How-To-Repeat: http://www.freshports.org/devel/ZendOptimizer/
